title: Section 12
content: 1[12. Certificate of registration of births or deaths.--The Registrar shall, as soon as the registration of a birth or death has been completed, but not later than seven days, give, free of charge, electronically or otherwise under his signature, to the person who gives information under section 8 or section 9, a certificate extracted from the register relating to such birth or death in such form and manner as may be prescribed.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 10, ibid., for section 12 (w.e.f. 1-10-2023).
